response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance song as 'Don't say 'lazy'' from the on-screen text. 2. Identified the original artist as 'Sakurakou K-On Bu' (K-On!) and the performer as 'Pavolia Reine'. 3. Used the search query: '"Don't say lazy" K-On! Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Found the lyrics. 5. Divided the rest of the video into scenes based on the merchandise being presented and the dialogue content.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a performance of "Don't say 'lazy'" by virtual idol Pavolia Reine, followed by a presentation and description of various merchandise items for her birthday, ending with her talking about her upcoming original song.

scenes.description: Pavolia Reine performs 'Don't say 'lazy''. The on-screen text 'Don't say 'lazy'' is visible.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Don't say "lazy"
Don't say "lazy"
Please don't say "You are lazy"
Datte hontou wa crazy
Hakuchoutachi wa sou
Mienai toko de BATA ashi suru n desu
Honnou ni juujun chuujitsu
Honrou mo juujuu shouchi
Zentou youyou dashi…
Dakara tama ni kyuukei shichaun desu
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Don't say "lazy"
Don't say "lazy"
Please don't say "You are lazy"
'Cause the truth is, I'm crazy
Swans do that
They paddle unseen
Instinct obedient, faithful
I'm fully aware that I'm being toyed with
The future is bright, too…
So that's why I sometimes take a break

scenes.description: Pavolia Reine talks about her birthday merchandise.
Presentation of 'Peafowl of the Blue Flame Rubber Mat'.
Presentation of 'Peafowl of the Blue Flame Tapestry'.
Presentation of 'Full Set' and 'Set Purchase Bonus'.
Closing remarks and mention of a new song.
